200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Huntsman’s damage increases by 5% for each minion he summons for 8 sec. Huntsman’s max health increases by 5% for each minion he summons for 8 sec.

description 4/6

Huntsman’s damage increases by 8% for each minion he summons for 8 sec. Huntsman’s max health increases by 8% for each minion he summons for 8 sec. Once in a while, Huntsman summons a Falcon that flies towards the enemy. It deals physical damage over time equal to 8% of the target’s max health in a small area. The Falcon also stuns all affected enemies for 0,5 sec and reduces their physical armor by 15% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

The damage of Huntsman and all allies is increased by 10% for each minion he summons for 8 sec. The max health of Huntsman and all allies is increased by 10% for each minion he summons for 8 sec. Once in a while, Huntsman summons a Falcon that flies towards the enemy. It deals physical damage over time equal to 15% of the target’s max health in a small area. The Falcon also stuns all affected enemies for 1 sec and reduces their physical armor by 30% for 5 sec. Once in a while, summons the Bear. The Bear’s health is equal to 200% of Huntsman’s max health, and the Bear’s damage is equal to 120% of Huntsman damage. When the Bear is summoned, it provokes all enemies, causing them to attack the Bear. All damage dealt by the Bear is reduced by 50%. Once in a while, the Bear lets out a wild roar, stunning all enemies for 2 sec. All enemies affected by the roar take physical damage based on their distance from the Bear. The closer the enemy, the higher the damage and vice versa. Max damage is 400000, and min damage is 100000. Additionally, all allies have their damage and health increased by 20% for 10 sec. During this time, Huntsman’s attacks stun the target for 2 sec and reduce its physical armor by 10% for 10 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Huntsman’s pierce increases by 25% for each minion he summons for 5 sec.

description 4/6

Huntsman’s pierce increases by 25% for each minion he summons for 5 sec. At the end of its flight, the Falcon blasts all enemy archers, dealing 300000 physical damage and silencing them for 3 sec. Affected enemy archers can’t use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped).

description 6/6

Huntsman’s pierce increases by 25% for each minion he summons for 5 sec. At the end of its flight, the Falcon blasts all enemy archers, dealing 300000 physical damage and silencing them for 3 sec. Affected enemy archers can’t use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). When the Bear dies, damage of Huntsman and all allies increases by 35% for 5 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Huntsman’s physical and magic armor increases by 25% for each minion he summons for 8 sec.

description 4/6

Huntsman’s physical and magic armor increases by 25% for each minion he summons for 8 sec. All armor reduced by the Falcon is transferred to the Huntsman for 10 sec.

description 6/6

Huntsman’s physical and magic armor increases by 25% for each minion he summons for 8 sec. All armor reduced by the Falcon is transferred to the Huntsman for 10 sec. When the Bear dies, damage dealt to Huntsman and all allies is reduced by 20% for 10 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When the Huntsman summons a minion, they reduce the damage and attack speed 3 of random enemy fighters by 10% for 8 sec.

description 4/6

When the Huntsman summons a minion, they reduce the damage and attack speed 3 of random enemy fighters by 10% for 8 sec. When the stun applied by the Falcon wears off, the enemy’s damage is reduced by 25% for 10 sec.

description 6/6

When the Huntsman summons a minion, they reduce the damage and attack speed 3 of random enemy fighters by 10% for 8 sec. When the stun applied by the Falcon wears off, the enemy’s damage is reduced by 25% for 10 sec. When the Bear dies, the physical and magic armor of Huntsman and all allies increases by 25% for 5 sec.

Materials

Valuable Fur
Camouflage
